name: Pembridge Resources plc
summary: Pembridge Resources plc focuses on exploring base and precious metals in Canada. The company primarily explores for copper, gold, and silver ores. It operates the Minto mine in Yukon, Canada. The company was formerly known as China Africa Resources Plc and changed its name to Pembridge Resources plc in April 2017. Pembridge Resources plc was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
